message: beads: add viz phase map tasks

files.patch:
@@ -6,6 +6,11 @@
 {"id":"bd-24q.10.2","title":"Outliers: UI Panel + Chart Point Annotations","description":"Build the outlier UX:
- Panel: metric dropdown, Top-N selector, filters (buckets, time resolution), and a clear "why this is an outlier" evidence drawer.
- Charts: annotate outlier points (small markers) + hover tooltip; clicking marker selects corresponding list item and jumps commit.
- Mobile: panel inside sheet; chart annotation remains visible but not cluttered.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:46:52.305096768Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:46:52.305096768Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.10.2","depends_on_id":"bd-24q.10","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:46:52.305096768Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-24q.10.3","title":"Outliers: Unit Tests (Robust Scoring + Evidence)","description":"Unit tests:
- MAD z-score correctness on synthetic series with known median/MAD.
- Edge cases: MAD=0, short series, NaNs, identical points.
- Evidence object: ensure it includes value/median/MAD/z and sums for bucket-weighted series.

Diagnostics
- On failure, print the series, computed stats, and top-K list.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:46:58.250699350Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:46:58.250699350Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.10.3","depends_on_id":"bd-24q.10","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:46:58.250699350Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-24q.10.4","title":"Outliers: E2E Tests (Panel + Chart Marker Jump)","description":"E2E scenarios:
- Select metric (lev), set Top-N=5, click #1 outlier -> commit selection changes and charts show marker.
- Click marker on chart -> outlier list selection changes and doc/diff updates.

Diagnostics
- Log chosen metric, outlier ids/hashes, and whether chart marker series is present.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:47:03.281285435Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:47:03.281285435Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.10.4","depends_on_id":"bd-24q.10","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:47:03.281285435Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"bd-24q.11","title":"Viz: Phase Map Overlay (Change Points + Regime Segments)","description":"Goal
- Turn the evolution into readable "phases": detect change points in the metric series (lev/tokens/lines and/or bucket-weighted), then overlay regime segments directly on the charts and timeline dock.

UX (Desktop)
- Toggle "Phase overlay": charts show softly tinted phase bands + labels (Phase 1..N). Hover shows segment stats (duration, mean, variance, top buckets).
- Clicking a phase band filters commit list + section summary to that segment.

UX (Mobile)
- Phase bands visible but subtle; phase details appear in a bottom sheet on tap.

Implementation Notes (Alien-Artifact Leaning)
- Use principled change-point detection (BOCPD with explicit hazard + likelihood model) and expose an evidence ledger per detected change (posterior mass / score).
- Prefer explainable segmentation over ad-hoc thresholds; allow selecting the driving metric.
- Cache computed phases in worker/localStorage by dataset hash.

Acceptance Criteria
- Phases feel stable and useful (not flickery); user can understand what changed and when.

Testing
- Unit tests using synthetic piecewise-stationary sequences; assert detected change points within tolerance.
- E2E tests: toggle phase overlay, tap a phase, verify filtering/jump behavior.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:47:16.914843010Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:47:16.914843010Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.11","depends_on_id":"bd-24q","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:47:16.914843010Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"bd-24q.11.1","title":"Phase Map: BOCPD Implementation + Evidence Ledger","description":"Implement / improve BOCPD in a way that's reliable and explainable:
- Choose likelihood model(s): e.g., Gaussian for normalized series, Poisson for count-like series.
- Explicit hazard function; expose "sensitivity" as an interpretable parameter.
- Output: change points + segments with posterior mass / confidence.
- Evidence ledger per change: top contributing metric movement, before/after means/vars, and any bucket-weight contribution if available.
- Run in worker; cache by dataset hash + metric + sensitivity.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:47:24.789131094Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:47:24.789131094Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.11.1","depends_on_id":"bd-24q.11","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:47:24.789131094Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"bd-24q.11.2","title":"Phase Map: Overlay Rendering + Phase Interactions","description":"Render phase segments into the main charts and timeline dock:
- Subtle tinted bands behind the line/stack chart; labels that don't clutter.
- Hover/tap reveals phase summary (duration, mean/var, top buckets).
- Clicking a phase filters commit list + outlier panel + section summary to that segment; toggle to clear filter.
- URL state stores selected phase id + metric used for segmentation.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:47:29.138788860Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:47:29.138788860Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.11.2","depends_on_id":"bd-24q.11","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:47:29.138788860Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"bd-24q.11.3","title":"Phase Map: Unit Tests (Synthetic Change-Point Sequences)","description":"Unit tests:
- Synthetic piecewise-stationary sequences (2-5 segments) with controlled noise; assert change points detected within an index tolerance.
- Edge cases: constant series, single spike, gradual drift.
- Evidence ledger invariants: posterior/confidence in [0,1], segments cover all indices with no gaps/overlaps.

Diagnostics
- On failure, print the series, detected cps, and per-cp evidence summary.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:47:33.813419417Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:47:33.813419417Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.11.3","depends_on_id":"bd-24q.11","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:47:33.813419417Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"bd-24q.11.4","title":"Phase Map: E2E Tests (Toggle + Phase Filter)","description":"E2E scenarios:
- Toggle phase overlay on/off; ensure chart renders without errors.
- Click/tap a phase band -> commit list and outlier list filter to that segment; clear filter restores full set.
- URL round-trip: copy permalink with phase selected; reload -> same phase is selected.

Diagnostics
- Log metric used, phase id, segment boundaries, and filtered commit count.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:47:39.710706475Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:47:39.710706475Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.11.4","depends_on_id":"bd-24q.11","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:47:39.710706475Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-24q.2","title":"Viz: Heading Mini-Map + Changed-Section Highlighting","description":"Add a left-side (desktop) / slide-over (mobile) heading mini-map generated from the rendered markdown, with per-commit indicators for which headings changed. Clicking a heading scrolls the doc pane; diff view can auto-scroll to first change under that heading.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.846093570Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.846093570Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.2","depends_on_id":"bd-24q","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.846093570Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-24q.3","title":"Viz: Shareable Permalinks (URL State) + Copy Link","description":"Encode visualization state in the URL (commit idx, tab, resolution, metric, bucket filters). Add a Copy Link button. Deep links should load without needing any server logic.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.919682255Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.919682255Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.3","depends_on_id":"bd-24q","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.919682255Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-24q.4","title":"Viz: Story Mode (Curated Milestones + Autoplay)","description":"Add an optional narrative layer: curated milestones (hand-picked commits) with short annotations and an autoplay scrubber. Desktop: right-side timeline card; Mobile: full-screen swipeable cards.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.993920674Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.993920674Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.4","depends_on_id":"bd-24q","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.993920674Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
